name: Shrimp Cocktail Tarts
recipeIngredient: 12 oz. pkg. frozen small cooked shrimp, thawed, rinsed, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Allow both pie crust packages to stand at room temperature for 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Unfold each crust and remove the top plastic sheet. Press out fold lines. Invert the dough and remove the remaining plastic sheet.
4. Cut about ten 3-inch circles from each crust.
5. Fit the circles over the backs of miniature muffin cups, pinching 4 or 5 equally spaced pleats around the sides of each cup.
6. Prick the pastry generously with a fork.
7. Bake at 450°F for 9 to 13 minutes, or until light golden brown. Allow to cool completely before removing from the muffin cups.
8. Place a small amount of chopped lettuce in each tart shell.
9. Spoon shrimp pieces over the lettuce layer.
10. Top with a small amount of cocktail sauce.
11. Garnish as desired.
Yield: 20 appetizers
